name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing instead of manual invoicing and payment tracking.
problem_solved: Cash flow gaps due to delayed invoicing and payment processing.
